hero.title: AI for Chiropractor
hero.description: Your virtual assistant supports your chiropractic practice by handling appointments, reminders, treatment notes, and follow-ups.

stats.label: Fewer missed appointments with automated reminders.
Reduced hours spent on scheduling and note-taking.
Higher patient adherence to recovery exercises and care plans.

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Run Your Chiropractic Practice
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, our AI Virtual Receptionist helps chiropractors simplify admin tasks while maintaining exceptional patient care. It handles your calls, schedules appointments, and provides information about your treatments — all with accuracy and professionalism. Whether you're adjusting a patient or consulting, your AI Receptionist ensures every inquiry is answered immediately.

blocks.heading: Focus on Patient Care, Not Phone Calls
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist takes care of scheduling, rescheduling, and cancellations while you focus on spinal adjustments and consultations. It can answer common questions like 'Do you treat sciatica?' or 'How long does an initial consultation take?' — giving patients instant, helpful answers while maintaining a professional tone.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a New Patient or Booking Again
blocks.description: Whether you're with a patient or your clinic is closed, your AI Receptionist keeps your business moving. It provides accurate details about your services, from spinal alignment and posture correction to injury rehabilitation and wellness care. It can also confirm appointments in real time, manage cancellations, and send reminders — reducing no-shows and improving clinic efficiency.

keyBenefits.subtitle: Enhance your chiropractic practice with intelligent automation that reduces admin work, increases efficiency.

cards.title: Reduced Stress

cards.title: Improved Patient Experience

cards.title: Professional and Knowledgeable
cards.description: Answers patient queries confidently about chiropractic services, health plans, and consultation details.

cards.title: Affordable 24/7 Coverage
cards.description: Eliminate missed calls and reduce admin costs with a reliable, round-the-clock assistant.

cards.title: Boosted Reputation and Retention
cards.description: Patients appreciate fast, professional communication — leading to higher satisfaction and loyalty.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Chiropractors Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is designed for Australian chiropractors who value professionalism and precision. It integrates with your existing booking system, manages calls smoothly, and ensures your patients feel cared for from the first contact. Let our AI handle your reception so you can focus on helping patients move, heal, and feel better.

card.heading: Comprehensive Follow-Up and Patient Notes
card.description: After each appointment, chiropractors can record voice memos that are automatically transcribed and summarized, add progress notes, and upload X-rays, treatment plans, or other documentation. All information is securely stored in one dashboard, making follow-ups and patient continuity easy and efficient.
